description:
Offered: every Fall
Intro to Video Editing is an introductory-level workshop course that explores the editing and delivery of short non-fiction video content. Editing and motion graphics software will be utilized in the production of works such as human-interest profile, news reportage, and promotional content. Basic motion graphics and audio mixing will be integrated in finished work.
Prerequisite(s): Sophomore standing and either COMM 1205 or COMM 1220
prerequisites: Sophomore standing and either COMM 1205 or COMM 1220
